<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelPackageTools\Concerns\Package; trait HasMigrations { public bool $runsMigrations = false; public bool $discoversMigrations = false; public ?string $migrationsPath = null; public array $migrationFileNames = []; public function runsMigrations(bool $runsMigrations = true): static { $this->runsMigrations = $runsMigrations; return $this; } public function hasMigration(string $migrationFileName): static { $this->migrationFileNames[] = $migrationFileName; return $this; } public function hasMigrations(...$migrationFileNames): static { $this->migrationFileNames = array_merge( $this->migrationFileNames, collect($migrationFileNames)->flatten()->toArray() ); return $this; } public function discoversMigrations(bool $discoversMigrations = true, string $path = '/database/migrations'): static { $this->discoversMigrations = $discoversMigrations; $this->migrationsPath = $path; return $this; } }
